description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is already loaded in InVesalius 3. Export a 3D surface model of the skull as an STL file to /home/ga/Documents/. The filename must follow the format '<PatientID>_Skull.stl', where <PatientID> is the ID found in the DICOM metadata. Use the standard bone surface settings for the model. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
